name: ScrollTop
description: ScrollTop gets displayed after a certain scroll position and used to navigates to the top of the page quickly.

props.name: threshold
props.description: Defines the threshold value of the vertical scroll position of the target to toggle the visibility.

props.name: behavior
props.description: Defines the scrolling behaviour, 'smooth' adds an animation and 'auto' scrolls with a jump.

props.name: buttonProps
props.description: Used to pass all properties of the ButtonProps to the Button component.

props.name: unstyled
props.description: When enabled, it removes component related styles in the core.
